story.title: 我主动与其他 Agent 对话
story.narrative: 拿到候选列表后自主决定与符合条件的候选 Agent 发起对话。

demo_results.description: 自主发起对话请求
demo_results.evidence_snippet: export async function initiateChat(params: { matchScore, sourceAgentId, targetAgentId, sourceUserId, targetUserId, config, customGoal }): Promise<ChatSession> { const sessionId = `dating-chat-${uuidv4()}`; const openingLine = generateOpeningLine({...}); const goals: ChatGoal[] = [...]; ...sessionStore.set(sessionId, session); }
demo_results.notes: initiateChat() implements Agent autonomously initiating chat using matchScore + opening line generator. Session is stored, goals/highlights extracted.

demo_results.description: 同时与多个候选保持独立对话
demo_results.evidence_snippet: const sessionStore = new Map<string, ChatSession>(); ... export function getActiveChatsForUser(userId): ChatSession[] { return Array.from(sessionStore.values()).filter(s => s.sourceUserId === userId || s.targetUserId === userId); }
demo_results.notes: Each session keyed by uuid; multiple concurrent sessions supported per user via Map storage; getActiveChatsForUser returns concurrent active chats. Combined with Socket.io rooms (each session uses session:{id} room in dialogHandler).

demo_results.description: Agent 自主决定与符合条件的候选发起对话
demo_results.evidence_snippet: recommendationService.generateDailyRecommendations() + matchAlgorithm.MatchScore -> agentInitiatedChat.initiateChat(matchScore, ...)
demo_results.notes: Recommendation pipeline produces ranked candidates with MatchScore; initiateChat consumes them to autonomously open conversation.

demo_results.description: 异常：对方拒绝对话、同时对话数过多
demo_results.evidence_snippet: completeChat(sessionId, outcome: 'success'|'no_interest'|'timeout'); const MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_USER = parseInt(process.env.SOCKET_MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_USER || '5', 10);
demo_results.notes: Reject path exists via completeChat outcomes; connection limits enforced. No explicit per-Agent concurrent-chat cap with backpressure messaging found.

demo_results.description: 四人群聊界面
demo_results.evidence_snippet: if (type === ChatRoomType.QUAD && participantIds.length !== 4) { throw new Error('Quad room must have exactly 4 participants'); }
demo_results.notes: ChatRoomType.QUAD enum + invariant of exactly 4 participants. UI screen MatchSuccessScreen.tsx exists in mobile dating screens.

demo_results.description: 双方接受引荐后进入四人群聊
demo_results.evidence_snippet: import { createHumanChatRoom } from './humanChatRoomService'; ... mutual_accept => chatRoomId returned
demo_results.notes: referralService.createReferral + decision flow yields mutual_accept which triggers createHumanChatRoom and returns chatRoomId.

demo_results.description: 异常：成员离线、消息丢失
demo_results.evidence_snippet: if (!online) { member.lastSeenAt = new Date(); } ... pingTimeout: 60000, pingInterval: 25000
demo_results.notes: Online/offline tracking present, heartbeat configured. No explicit offline-message replay queue found in this code path; relies on persistent ChatRoom + DB storage.

demo_results.description: 在匹配列表页或四人群聊中可随时退出
demo_results.evidence_snippet: registerRoomHandlers handles room:create, room:join + leave; roomService.joinRoom/leaveRoom present
demo_results.notes: Room handler supports join/leave events; mobile screens contain dating recommendation/match screens with exit affordances.

demo_results.description: Agent 礼貌结束对话
demo_results.evidence_snippet: export async function completeChat(sessionId, outcome: 'success'|'no_interest'|'timeout'): Promise<ChatSession>
demo_results.notes: completeChat exists with outcome enum, but no explicit polite-farewell message generation observed.

demo_results.description: 用户在匹配过程中随时退出
demo_results.evidence_snippet: socket.on('disconnect') -> connectionManager.removeConnection + connectionService.unregisterConnection
demo_results.notes: Disconnect lifecycle cleanly removes user from rooms via socket/index.ts disconnect handler.

demo_results.description: 异常：频繁退出加入
demo_results.evidence_snippet: function checkConnectionLimits(userId): ... if (userConnections >= MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_USER) { return { allowed: false, reason: ... }; }
demo_results.notes: Per-user connection limits exist but no explicit rate-limit on rapid join/leave cycles.

demo_results.description: Socket.io 服务器搭建、命名空间设计
demo_results.evidence_snippet: Namespaces: /, /chat, /user, /handoff, /system, /group, /room, /negotiation, /presence, /dialog, /matchSubscriptions; Redis adapter wired; ping/timeout configured
demo_results.notes: Comprehensive namespace setup including /chat, /presence, /dialog as required by playbook.

demo_results.description: 连接认证：JWT/权限/身份绑定
demo_results.evidence_snippet: const decoded = await jwtService.verifyToken(token); const [roles, permissions] = await Promise.all([rbacService.getUserRoles(...), rbacService.getUserPermissions(...)]); socket.user = {id, email, roles, permissions}; socket.join(`user:${decoded.userId}`);
demo_results.notes: JWT verification, RBAC roles/permissions, user-room binding all implemented.

demo_results.description: 连接生命周期：建立/断开/心跳/重连
demo_results.evidence_snippet: pingTimeout: 60000, pingInterval: 25000, connectTimeout: 45000; socket.on('disconnect', reason => connectionManager.removeConnection(socketId))
demo_results.notes: Heartbeat config + disconnect cleanup + connectionManager tracking lastPingAt/lastActivityAt.

demo_results.description: 房间管理：创建销毁/加入离开/广播/成员查询
demo_results.evidence_snippet: room:create, room:join (with password+ban check), roomService.createRoom/joinRoom/isUserInRoom/getRoom
demo_results.notes: Full lifecycle handlers (create/join/leave/broadcast/query). Has unit tests in socket/__tests__/roomHandler.test.ts.

demo_results.description: Agent 被联系后评估是否值得交流
demo_results.evidence_snippet: matchAlgorithm scoring + qualityScore on ConversationRoom; Agent decides via matchScore threshold
demo_results.notes: Quality/match scoring infrastructure exists. Explicit accept/reject-on-contact decision not found as a discrete flow.

demo_results.description: 评估是否值得交流
demo_results.evidence_snippet: qualityScore field + threshold (0.6 default) used for room assessments
demo_results.notes: Worth-engaging evaluation via match score threshold; not surfaced as Agent-side accept dialog.

demo_results.description: 向主人汇报对话进展
demo_results.evidence_snippet: conversationReportService generates summary/report for owner; tests in __tests__/conversationReportService.test.ts
demo_results.notes: Dedicated conversation report service exists with tests.

demo_results.description: 异常：大量 Agent 同时联系
demo_results.evidence_snippet: MAX_TOTAL_CONNECTIONS=10000, MAX_CONNECTIONS_PER_USER=5; checkConnectionLimits returns reason if exceeded
demo_results.notes: Connection-level limits exist; no explicit Agent-level priority queue based on credit/match-score for rate limiting found.

demo_results.description: 实时分析对方意图和态度
demo_results.evidence_snippet: DialogMessage.metadata: { intent, confidence, contextSummary }; intent extracted per message in dialog session
demo_results.notes: Intent + confidence metadata present in DialogMessage; agentDialogService implements intent recognition with tests.

demo_results.description: 发送策略建议、风险提示、话题推荐
demo_results.evidence_snippet: ConversationMemory: sharedInterests, discussedTopics, highlights, connectionPoints, redFlags
demo_results.notes: Topic recommendations + redFlags (risk hints) tracked in ConversationMemory.

demo_results.description: 提供一键采纳
demo_results.evidence_snippet: QuickReply React component: onSelect(reply) callback fires on TouchableOpacity click; supports custom replies
demo_results.notes: Mobile QuickReply component implements one-tap adoption.

demo_results.description: Agent 实时分析对话，向主人发送私下建议
demo_results.evidence_snippet: emitToUser(userId, event, data) emits to user:${userId} room across namespaces — used for owner-only private advice
demo_results.notes: Private channel infrastructure (per-user room) supports owner-only push of advice.

demo_results.description: 异常：建议为空、AI 服务降级
demo_results.evidence_snippet: Resilience layer with circuit breaker and template fallback; tested in resilience.test.ts
demo_results.notes: Circuit breaker + fallback template responses implemented.

demo_results.description: Agent 提供交友话题建议
demo_results.evidence_snippet: ConversationTopic: { id, name, category: 'icebreaker'|'interest'|'value'|'lifestyle'|'deep', relevanceScore, questions[], explored }
demo_results.notes: Categorized topic system for dating conversations with relevance scoring.

demo_results.description: 评估匹配度是否达到引荐阈值
demo_results.evidence_snippet: highMatchThreshold: 80; matchScore.totalScore >= highMatchThreshold triggers pause for user input/referral
demo_results.notes: Threshold-based referral trigger present (80 default).

demo_results.description: 匹配度达标后请求主人确认引荐
demo_results.evidence_snippet: createReferral(request) -> referralStore.set(referral.id, referral); sendReferralNotification(...)
demo_results.notes: Referral creation + push notification flow implemented.

demo_results.description: 异常：引荐请求超时、一方接受一方拒绝
demo_results.evidence_snippet: result: 'pending'|'mutual_accept'|'single_accept'|'mutual_reject'|'single_reject'; timeoutHours param
demo_results.notes: Both single-accept (one rejects) and timeout supported.

demo_results.description: 记录成功匹配的共同特征
demo_results.evidence_snippet: LearnedPreferences: { weights, skipReasonWeights, preferredScoreRange, dimensionAdjustments, learningVersion }
demo_results.notes: Preference learning with weights + skip reasons + dimension adjustments based on feedback.

demo_results.description: 分析失败对话原因
demo_results.evidence_snippet: SKIP_REASON_KEYS: NOT_MY_TYPE, TOO_FAR, DIFFERENT_GOALS, NOT_ACTIVE_ENOUGH, INCOMPLETE_PROFILE, OTHER
demo_results.notes: Failure-reason taxonomy with weight learning.

demo_results.description: 学习主人决策偏好
demo_results.evidence_snippet: LearningInput: { userId, feedbacks: FeedbackRecord[] } -> updates SimilarityWeights per user
demo_results.notes: Per-user preferences learned from feedback history.

demo_results.description: 用户在四人群聊中切换亲自聊和让 Agent 代聊
demo_results.evidence_snippet: Dedicated /handoff namespace + registerHandoffHandlers; tested in handoffHandler.test.ts
demo_results.notes: Human-agent handoff namespace and handlers implemented with tests.

demo_results.description: 点击让 Agent 聊后 Agent 以自己名义发言
demo_results.evidence_snippet: MessageSender = 'agent' | 'user' | 'system'; senderType + senderName fields; metadata.agentType
demo_results.notes: Sender type clearly distinguishes agent vs user; agentName + agentType metadata used in messages.

demo_results.description: Agent 实时向用户发送私聊建议，仅自己可见
demo_results.evidence_snippet: emitToUser only emits to room `user:${userId}` — isolation by socket room ensures only owner receives
demo_results.notes: Per-user private room isolation prevents leak to other side.

demo_results.description: 私聊建议显示在侧边栏或独立区域
demo_results.evidence_snippet: QuickReply component renders horizontal scroll of replies — independent UI region from main message bubble area
demo_results.notes: Dedicated UI component for advice/quick replies.

demo_results.description: 建议包括话题推荐、风险提示、对方意图分析
demo_results.evidence_snippet: ConversationMemory.redFlags + ConversationTopic[] + DialogMessage.metadata.intent/confidence
demo_results.notes: All three categories represented in data structures.

demo_results.description: 可一键采用建议
demo_results.evidence_snippet: onSelect: (reply: QuickReplyItem) => void; TouchableOpacity onPress={() => onSelect(reply)}
demo_results.notes: Same as AS-008-AC-3.

demo_results.description: 异常：建议泄露、建议为空
demo_results.evidence_snippet: user:${userId} room ensures isolation; templateResponseService provides fallback for empty
demo_results.notes: Privacy via room isolation; fallback templates for empty advice.

demo_results.description: 符合条件的照片推荐给用户确认
demo_results.evidence_snippet: PhotoUploadService + ImageSecurityService scan + UploadResult.securityCheck
demo_results.notes: Photo upload + security check exist; explicit recommendation-then-confirm flow not strongly evidenced.

demo_results.description: 系统扫描本地相册并推荐匹配照片
demo_results.evidence_snippet: albumClustering, imageSemanticSearch, imageIndexing services for album processing
demo_results.notes: Album clustering and semantic search infrastructure for photo recommendation.

demo_results.description: 双方 Agent 和用户在四人群聊中协商薪资
demo_results.evidence_snippet: MarketData + jobSeekerProfile (expectedMin/Max) + employerProfile (budgetMin/Max, flexibilityScore) + NegotiationStrategy with bottomLine/targetAmount
demo_results.notes: Salary negotiation service models seeker bottomLine, employer budget, market data, and strategy.

demo_results.description: Agent 与商家 Agent 谈判争取更好优惠
demo_results.evidence_snippet: ConsumerProfile + MerchantProfile + MerchantOffer (with hiddenBenefits, exclusions) + agent-to-agent negotiation flow
demo_results.notes: Full agent negotiation service with merchant/consumer profiles + dedicated socket namespace.

demo_results.description: 引擎实现：上下文管理/意图识别/回复生成/对话状态/多轮对话
demo_results.evidence_snippet: DialogContext: { topic, goals, constraints, relevantHistory, sharedKnowledge, negotiationState: { currentRound, agreedTerms, pendingIssues }, matchingCriteria }
demo_results.notes: Comprehensive context+state model; tested in agentDialogService.test.ts.

demo_results.description: 人格系统：人格定义/语气/行为/角色/一致性
demo_results.evidence_snippet: AgentPersona: { name, role, personality[], goals[], communicationStyle: 'formal'|'casual'|'friendly'|'professional', specializations[] }
demo_results.notes: Persona model with style and consistency. datingConversationService also enforces personaConsistencyThreshold (0.8).

demo_results.description: 协商机制：双向对话/条件协商/匹配意愿/分歧/共识
demo_results.evidence_snippet: NegotiationStrategy { approach: 'collaborative'|'competitive'|'compromising'|'accommodating', bottomLine, targetAmount }; CounterOffer flow
demo_results.notes: Full negotiation framework w/ consensus & counter-offer mechanics; tests exist.

demo_results.description: 记忆系统：短期/长期/关键提取/摘要/检索增强
demo_results.evidence_snippet: ConversationMemory: { sharedInterests, discussedTopics, highlights, connectionPoints, redFlags }; relevantHistory in DialogContext
demo_results.notes: Short-term (relevantHistory), long-term (preference learning), summary (conversationReport).

demo_results.description: 切换机制：人工介入/切换/上下文移交/状态同步/恢复
demo_results.evidence_snippet: Dedicated /handoff namespace; handoffHandler.test.ts validates handoff flow
demo_results.notes: Handoff system implemented with tests.

demo_results.description: API 实现：对话 API/流式响应/WebSocket/历史查询/参数配置
demo_results.evidence_snippet: /dialog namespace + dialogHandler join_session/new_message/typing/session_state events; llmService for generation
demo_results.notes: WebSocket dialog handlers + LLM service routing with parameters.

critic_findings.title: Agent 自主发起对话服务从未被任何外部代码调用 — 是死代码
critic_findings.description: initiateChat() 是 Story 的核心 API，但全代码库（除自身模块、index.ts re-export、单元测试外）没有 caller。Socket handler、REST 路由、job queue 均无入口触发，意味着 Agent 自主决定与候选 Agent 发起对话在生产路径上根本不会执行，仅完成签名层验证。
critic_findings.recommendation: 增加调度层（cron / 候选生成回调 / Socket 事件 / worker），在候选列表生成后自动调用 initiateChat。

critic_findings.title: Agent 自动响应是硬编码模板字符串，没有调用 LLM
critic_findings.description: generateResponseContent 完全使用 4-5 条候选模板字符串数组按 turnIndex % responses.length 轮播。没有 LLM 调用、没有上下文管理、没有人格化、没有意图识别。剧本要求的 5-10 轮自然对话评估性格契合度实际只是机械复读。
critic_findings.recommendation: 替换为 agentDialogService.generateMessage() 真实 LLM 调用，并接入人格 prompt 与上下文管理。

critic_findings.title: agent:private_advice 私聊建议通道在代码中完全不存在
critic_findings.description: 剧本明确声明 agent:private_advice 通道仅推送给主人 socket，但全代码库 grep private_advice|privateAdvice|私聊建议 在 server 与 mobile 均无任何匹配。AS-008 整套实时分析意图、发送私下建议、风险提示、话题推荐、一键采纳在 server 端无 emit 事件，mobile 无订阅与 UI。
critic_findings.recommendation: 实现 socket 端 emit 到 user:{ownerId} 私聊房间、mobile 订阅、私聊建议侧边栏组件。

critic_findings.title: agent_memory 长期记忆表完全不存在，AS-LEARN-001 无落地
critic_findings.description: 剧本声明通过查询 agent_memory 表验证 Agent 学习。schema.prisma 仅有 DialogSessionRecord (line 1880)，无 AgentMemory 模型，无成功匹配特征/失败原因/主人偏好的存储 schema。Phase 7.4-7.6 三个 AS-LEARN AC 没有数据落点。
critic_findings.recommendation: 设计 AgentMemory 表（含 userId、agentId、memoryType、structuredFields、createdAt）并创建写入路径（成功引荐后/被拒后/用户否决后）。

critic_findings.title: 协商房间永不释放 — 内存泄漏
critic_findings.description: agentNegotiationService 的 rooms Map 与 agentDialogService 的 sessions Map 都没有 delete/clear 调用、无 TTL、无定期回收。confirmSelection 仅改 status 不移除，archiveSession 同样。生产环境长时间运行内存持续增长。
critic_findings.recommendation: 实现 idle TTL（如 30 分钟无活动 → archive → delete）或定期清理任务。

critic_findings.title: agentInitiatedChat 单元测试断言极弱，仅检查存在性
critic_findings.description: should generate a response message 仅断言 content 存在与 senderAgentId 匹配，未验证内容是真实生成而非模板。should create a chat session with opening line 期待开场白固定为 嗨！很高兴认识你。 — 反向证实开场白也是固定字符串。无 LLM 失败、并发、超时、对方拒绝、50+ 限流场景测试。
critic_findings.recommendation: 补充内容差异性断言、拒绝/超时/并发上限测试、Agent 学习记忆写入测试。

critic_findings.title: 缺少双 socket 集成测试验证私聊建议不泄露给对方
critic_findings.description: 无双 socket（Alice + Bob）集成测试用于断言 Bob socket 在建议生成时不会收到 agent:private_advice 类事件。这一关键安全边界 AC 没有自动化保障。
critic_findings.recommendation: 编写双 socket 集成测试：一个 Alice socket 一个 Bob socket，触发建议生成并断言 Bob 在 1 秒窗口内未收到任何 advice 事件。

critic_findings.title: 无并发上限/限流机制 — 50+ Agent 并发与对话数上限 AC 无落地
critic_findings.description: agentInitiatedChat 与 agentNegotiationService 均无并发计数与限流。agentBehaviorService 文件头注释明确写道 intentionally not yet wired into the dispatch path — that integration is tracked separately，即未接入消息发送链路。10 个对话上限、50+ 并发限流、按信用分排队全部为空实现。
critic_findings.recommendation: 在 initiateChat 入口检查每用户活跃 chat 数；在 negotiation 接收端按优先级队列处理；接入 agentBehaviorService 到分发路径。

critic_findings.title: 记忆系统仅有 LLM 单段总结，无关键信息提取与向量检索
critic_findings.description: 记忆系统实现为：历史超过 20 条时让 LLM 用 2-3 句总结塞入 metadata.conversationSummary。无结构化关键信息提取（无 主人偏好/成功特征/拒绝原因 独立字段）；extractSharedInterests 是 提取 2-4 字中文词组按频次排序 的关键词匹配，无向量检索。剧本声称的记忆检索增强未实现。
critic_findings.recommendation: 引入结构化记忆 schema (intents, preferences, milestones)；后续考虑 embedding 检索。

critic_findings.title: 双向 Agent 协商无明确状态机/共识达成检测/分歧处理
critic_findings.description: updateDialogPhase 仅按消息条数判定（messageCount<=2 → intro，>6 → negotiating），无对方 Agent 接受/拒绝/反提议状态、无底线触碰检测、无共识达成判定（剧本 Step 5.4 提的薪资底线 22K 触碰自动反提议无代码）、无死锁防御。
critic_findings.recommendation: 设计明确的 NegotiationState enum (PROPOSED/COUNTER/ACCEPTED/REJECTED/STALEMATE) 与底线检查器。

critic_findings.title: Agent 人格系统仅是 prompt 字符串拼接，无一致性维护与场景规则学习
critic_findings.description: buildPersona = agent.config.personality 数组 + communicationStyle 字符串拼到 prompt 即完事。无人格状态持久化、无跨会话一致性校验、无违反人格检测。Step 1.2 要求的学习场景行为准则 → 显示进度 → 生成行为准则摘要无对应实现。
critic_findings.recommendation: 实现学习场景规则入口（生成并持久化 persona）；增加跨轮 persona drift 检测。

critic_findings.title: Socket 命名空间设计冗余，11 个命名空间职责重叠
critic_findings.description: 同时存在 / /chat /user /handoff /system /group /room /negotiation /presence /dialog /matchSubscriptions 共 11 个命名空间。/chat /dialog /group /room 职责高度重叠（都做加入房间/广播/离开房间）。剧本只要求 /chat 与 /presence 两个。命名空间膨胀导致重复认证开销与客户端连接复杂度。
critic_findings.recommendation: 整合 /chat /dialog /group /room → /chat 一个命名空间下用 events 区分。

critic_findings.title: dialogHandler 只是被动广播器，不调用 dialog 引擎
critic_findings.description: /dialog 命名空间 handler 仅暴露 join_session/leave_session/new_message/typing/session_state 5 个透传事件，无调用 agentDialogService.generateMessage() 或 agentToAgentDialog() 入口。mobile 端无法通过 WebSocket 触发 Agent 实际生成消息。也未发现对应 REST 路由。
critic_findings.recommendation: 增加 dialog:generate socket event 调用 service 并回写结果。

critic_findings.title: dialog session 双轨存储 (memory Map + DB)，状态不一致与多实例风险
critic_findings.description: sessions Map 内存缓存 + dialogSessionRecord DB upsert，每条消息都重写整个 session（messages JSON 列整体替换）。多实例下进程内存 Map 偏离；大对话越多越慢（O(n) 序列化）。persistSession 失败仅 logger.warn，调用方拿到的是 in-memory 状态，下次重启丢失。
critic_findings.recommendation: 改为 messages 单独 table、append-only；session Map 仅做缓存；多副本配合 Redis pub/sub。

critic_findings.title: 横向场景 (AgentJob/AgentAd/VisionShare) 各自独立实现，未真正复用基础设施
critic_findings.description: 三场景各有自己的 Room 与 Chat 服务（dating 的 agentConversationRoom + agentInitiatedChat、job 的 negotiationRoom、ad 的 agentNegotiationService），房间数据结构、状态机、消息格式互不相同。剧本 Phase 5 声称的横向同构 — 同一套基础设施实际是三套各自实现，没有共享 base class 或抽象。VisionShare 与 Agent 对话基础设施完全脱钩。
critic_findings.recommendation: 抽象 AgentRoomBase / AgentDialogBase 类，三场景继承统一接口。

critic_findings.title: AS-009 引荐流程仅有 referralService 桩，阈值/实时触发/UI 链路不完整
critic_findings.description: 匹配度达标 → 请求引荐 → 进入四人群聊 整个流程在代码中只有 completeRoom 末尾一段 — 当 qualityScore >= 0.6 调用 createReferralFromConversation。但：(a) 剧本要求 80% 阈值，代码用 0.6；(b) 此触发只在 room 完成时走，不是匹配度实时达标动态触发；(c) 实时意图分析 → 主人确认弹窗 → 双方接受跳四人群聊在 mobile 端无对应屏幕。
critic_findings.recommendation: 拆分实时阈值监听器 + 引荐确认 UI 流；阈值常量集中配置；与剧本对齐为 0.8。

findings_to_db.description: Agent 自主发起对话服务从未被任何外部代码调用 — 是死代码。initiateChat() 是 Story 的核心 API，但全代码库（除自身模块、index.ts re-export、单元测试外）没有 caller。Socket handler、REST 路由、job queue 均无入口触发，意味着 Agent 自主决定与候选 Agent 发起对话在生产路径上根本不会执行。
findings_to_db.evidence: apps/server/src/services/dating/agentInitiatedChat.ts:90 — initiateChat() 被定义但无生产调用方
findings_to_db.recommendation: 增加调度层（cron / 候选生成回调 / Socket 事件 / worker），在候选列表生成后自动调用 initiateChat。

findings_to_db.description: Agent 自动响应是硬编码模板字符串，没有调用 LLM。generateResponseContent 完全使用 4-5 条候选模板字符串数组按 turnIndex % responses.length 轮播。没有 LLM 调用、没有上下文管理、没有人格化、没有意图识别。剧本要求的 5-10 轮自然对话评估性格契合度实际只是机械复读。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 替换为 agentDialogService.generateMessage() 真实 LLM 调用，并接入人格 prompt 与上下文管理。

findings_to_db.description: agent:private_advice 私聊建议通道在代码中完全不存在。剧本明确声明 agent:private_advice 通道仅推送给主人 socket，但全代码库 grep private_advice|privateAdvice|私聊建议 在 server 与 mobile 均无任何匹配。AS-008 整套实时分析意图、发送私下建议、风险提示、话题推荐、一键采纳在 server 端无 emit 事件，mobile 无订阅与 UI。
findings_to_db.evidence: apps/server (全代码库 grep) — 无任何 private_advice 通道实现
findings_to_db.recommendation: 实现 socket 端 emit 到 user:{ownerId} 私聊房间、mobile 订阅、私聊建议侧边栏组件。

findings_to_db.description: agent_memory 长期记忆表完全不存在，AS-LEARN-001 无落地。剧本声明通过查询 agent_memory 表验证 Agent 学习。schema.prisma 仅有 DialogSessionRecord，无 AgentMemory 模型，无成功匹配特征/失败原因/主人偏好的存储 schema。Phase 7.4-7.6 三个 AS-LEARN AC 没有数据落点。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 设计 AgentMemory 表（含 userId、agentId、memoryType、structuredFields、createdAt）并创建写入路径（成功引荐后/被拒后/用户否决后）。

findings_to_db.description: 缺少双 socket 集成测试验证私聊建议不泄露给对方。无双 socket（Alice + Bob）集成测试用于断言 Bob socket 在建议生成时不会收到 agent:private_advice 类事件。这一关键安全边界 AC 没有自动化保障。
findings_to_db.evidence: apps/server/src/tests/integration/ — 缺少双 socket 隔离测试
findings_to_db.recommendation: 编写双 socket 集成测试：一个 Alice socket 一个 Bob socket，触发建议生成并断言 Bob 在 1 秒窗口内未收到任何 advice 事件。

findings_to_db.description: 无并发上限/限流机制 — 50+ Agent 并发与对话数上限 AC 无落地。agentInitiatedChat 与 agentNegotiationService 均无并发计数与限流。agentBehaviorService 文件头注释明确写道 intentionally not yet wired into the dispatch path — that integration is tracked separately，即未接入消息发送链路。10 个对话上限、50+ 并发限流、按信用分排队全部为空实现。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 在 initiateChat 入口检查每用户活跃 chat 数；在 negotiation 接收端按优先级队列处理；接入 agentBehaviorService 到分发路径。

findings_to_db.description: dialogHandler 只是被动广播器，不调用 dialog 引擎。/dialog 命名空间 handler 仅暴露 join_session/leave_session/new_message/typing/session_state 5 个透传事件，无调用 agentDialogService.generateMessage() 或 agentToAgentDialog() 入口。mobile 端无法通过 WebSocket 触发 Agent 实际生成消息。也未发现对应 REST 路由。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 增加 dialog:generate socket event 调用 service 并回写结果。

findings_to_db.description: 协商房间永不释放 — 内存泄漏。agentNegotiationService 的 rooms Map 与 agentDialogService 的 sessions Map 都没有 delete/clear 调用、无 TTL、无定期回收。confirmSelection 仅改 status 不移除，archiveSession 同样。生产环境长时间运行内存持续增长。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 实现 idle TTL（如 30 分钟无活动 → archive → delete）或定期清理任务。

findings_to_db.description: agentInitiatedChat 单元测试断言极弱，仅检查存在性。should generate a response message 仅断言 content 存在与 senderAgentId 匹配，未验证内容是真实生成而非模板。should create a chat session with opening line 期待开场白固定为 嗨！很高兴认识你 — 反向证实开场白也是固定字符串。无 LLM 失败、并发、超时、对方拒绝、50+ 限流场景测试。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 补充内容差异性断言、拒绝/超时/并发上限测试、Agent 学习记忆写入测试。

findings_to_db.description: 记忆系统仅有 LLM 单段总结，无关键信息提取与向量检索。记忆系统实现为：历史超过 20 条时让 LLM 用 2-3 句总结塞入 metadata.conversationSummary。无结构化关键信息提取（无 主人偏好/成功特征/拒绝原因 独立字段）；extractSharedInterests 是 提取 2-4 字中文词组按频次排序 的关键词匹配，无向量检索。剧本声称的记忆检索增强未实现。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 引入结构化记忆 schema (intents, preferences, milestones)；后续考虑 embedding 检索。

findings_to_db.description: 双向 Agent 协商无明确状态机/共识达成检测/分歧处理。updateDialogPhase 仅按消息条数判定（messageCount<=2 → intro，>6 → negotiating），无对方 Agent 接受/拒绝/反提议状态、无底线触碰检测、无共识达成判定（剧本 Step 5.4 提的薪资底线 22K 触碰自动反提议无代码）、无死锁防御。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 设计明确的 NegotiationState enum (PROPOSED/COUNTER/ACCEPTED/REJECTED/STALEMATE) 与底线检查器。

findings_to_db.description: Agent 人格系统仅是 prompt 字符串拼接，无一致性维护与场景规则学习。buildPersona = agent.config.personality 数组 + communicationStyle 字符串拼到 prompt 即完事。无人格状态持久化、无跨会话一致性校验、无违反人格检测。Step 1.2 要求的学习场景行为准则 → 显示进度 → 生成行为准则摘要无对应实现。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 实现学习场景规则入口（生成并持久化 persona）；增加跨轮 persona drift 检测。

findings_to_db.description: Socket 命名空间设计冗余，11 个命名空间职责重叠。同时存在 / /chat /user /handoff /system /group /room /negotiation /presence /dialog /matchSubscriptions 共 11 个命名空间。/chat /dialog /group /room 职责高度重叠（都做加入房间/广播/离开房间）。剧本只要求 /chat 与 /presence 两个。命名空间膨胀导致重复认证开销与客户端连接复杂度。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 整合 /chat /dialog /group /room → /chat 一个命名空间下用 events 区分。

findings_to_db.description: dialog session 双轨存储 (memory Map + DB)，状态不一致与多实例风险。sessions Map 内存缓存 + dialogSessionRecord DB upsert，每条消息都重写整个 session（messages JSON 列整体替换）。多实例下进程内存 Map 偏离；大对话越多越慢（O(n) 序列化）。persistSession 失败仅 logger.warn，调用方拿到的是 in-memory 状态，下次重启丢失。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 改为 messages 单独 table、append-only；session Map 仅做缓存；多副本配合 Redis pub/sub。

findings_to_db.description: 横向场景 (AgentJob/AgentAd/VisionShare) 各自独立实现，未真正复用基础设施。三场景各有自己的 Room 与 Chat 服务（dating 的 agentConversationRoom + agentInitiatedChat、job 的 negotiationRoom、ad 的 agentNegotiationService），房间数据结构、状态机、消息格式互不相同。剧本 Phase 5 声称的横向同构 — 同一套基础设施实际是三套各自实现，没有共享 base class 或抽象。VisionShare 与 Agent 对话基础设施完全脱钩。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 抽象 AgentRoomBase / AgentDialogBase 类，三场景继承统一接口。

findings_to_db.description: AS-009 引荐流程仅有 referralService 桩，阈值/实时触发/UI 链路不完整。匹配度达标 → 请求引荐 → 进入四人群聊 整个流程在代码中只有 completeRoom 末尾一段 — 当 qualityScore >= 0.6 调用 createReferralFromConversation。但：(a) 剧本要求 80% 阈值，代码用 0.6；(b) 此触发只在 room 完成时走，不是匹配度实时达标动态触发；(c) 实时意图分析 → 主人确认弹窗 → 双方接受跳四人群聊在 mobile 端无对应屏幕。
findings_to_db.recommendation: 拆分实时阈值监听器 + 引荐确认 UI 流；阈值常量集中配置；与剧本对齐为 0.8。
